productDisplayName: Estee Lauder Women Pleasures Bloom 100 ml Perfume
description: The notes of this fragrance are: grapefruit, raspberry, lychee, violet flower pink peony, rose, jasmine, green lily, musk, patchouli, creamy vanilla. Pleasures Bloom arrives in a reinterpretation of the original flacon with a metallic cap decorated with a pink fuchsia flower, while the outer carton has floral pattern.
